content.rendered:
Pioneers in Eye Care

Giridhar Eye Institute (GEI)

Kadavanthra, Edappally, Mattancherry, Thripunithura

Dr Giridhar A

Medical Director & Chief Mentor

Dr. Giridhar A, a distinguished Vitreo Retinal Surgeon, brings over four decades of expertise to Giridhar Eye Institute. Trained at Sankara Nethralaya, he has mentored 42+ surgeons in Vitreo Retinal surgery and 75 ophthalmologists in Medical Retina. With over 75+ publications and 250+ lectures on national and international platforms and with prestigious awards including the APAO Distinguished Service Award, his expertise extends to Diabetic Retinopathy, Age-Related Macular Degeneration, and Vitreous surgery.

Meet Our Doctors

Dr Giridhar A

Medical Director & Chief Mentor

Dr. Giridhar A, a distinguished Vitreo Retinal Surgeon, brings over four decades of expertise to Giridhar Eye Institute. Trained at Sankara Nethralaya, he has mentored 42+ surgeons in Vitreo Retinal surgery and 75 ophthalmologists in Medical Retina. Meet Our Doctors

Dr Kanchana Giridhar

Asst. Medical Director

As the Asst. Medical Director of Giridhar Eye Institute, Dr. Kanchana Giridhar has played a pivotal role in shaping the institute’s journey towards excellence. Her dedication to patient care and operational leadership has been integral to establishing the institute as a premier destination for eye care. Under her guidance, the institute continues to set new standards in ophthalmology, prioritizing innovation, compassion, and quality in all aspects of care. Together with Dr. Giridhar A, she ensures that the institute remains committed to its mission of delivering world-class eye care.

Meet Management Team
